auth_notes: Requires Twilio Account SID and Auth Token. For certain operations, a Messaging Service SID or specific Twilio Phone Number is also needed.
rate_limits: Default concurrency limit of 100 requests. SMS throughput varies by number type (e.g., 1 MPS for standard long codes, higher for Toll-Free or Short Codes).
gotchas: Strict A2P 10DLC registration requirements for US SMS to prevent carrier filtering.
Trial accounts can only send to verified 'To' numbers and include mandatory branding.
Webhook URLs must be publicly accessible and should ideally implement X-Twilio-Signature validation for security.
research_notes: Twilio is the default n8n provider for this category. While the API is excellent, deliverability depends heavily on regulatory compliance and number reputation rather than technical API constraints.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Twilio is the default n8n provider for this category. While the API is excellent, deliverability depends heavily on regulatory compliance and number reputation rather than technical API constraints.
